mapper.select: select u.user_id, u.email, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.gender, u.signature, u.listen_count, u.experience, u.following_count, u.follower_count, u.birthday, u.user_type, u.password_status, u.privacy_allow_messages, u.privacy_show_listening_habits from user u where u.nickname like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET following_count = following_count + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET following_count = GREATEST(following_count - 1, 0) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET follower_count = follower_count + 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE user SET follower_count = GREATEST(follower_count - 1, 0) WHERE user_id = #{userId}
